description: Strongly formulated note by the prominent judge Natan b. Shemuel ("al-Nezer"), active 1128–1164 CE, to a prominent member of the community, urging the man to send him money for the sick people while staying in his house. EMS. On verso there is a probably-unrelated name in Arabic script, perhaps from a chancery document: ʿabduhā al-Kāmilī Masʿūd.
tags: communal, Illness: treatment, medical charity, illness: hospice, Natan b. Shemuel, illness letter 969-1517, Illness
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
